summary: Ultimate Gaming Arena — a multi-game web app featuring Tic Tac Toe, Snake, and Traffic Car games with a dark neon theme. Current upgrade: adding HTML5 sound effects (click, win, game over, scoring, special events) with a global mute/unmute toggle, difficulty selector screens before each game, and per-game difficulty levels (Easy/Medium/Hard with game-specific behaviors).
architectural_notes: Dark neon theme must remain consistent across all games and new UI elements
Use HTML5 Audio API for all sound effects

existing_features.title: Create a global sound manager module (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useSoundManager.ts) that uses HTML5 Audio API to play distinct sound effects for: click/button press, win, game over, score increment, and special events. Expose a global mute/unmute toggle that persists its state in localStorage.

Create a reusable DifficultySelector component styled in the dark neon theme that presents Easy / Medium / Hard options and a game title. This screen must appear before each game starts for Tic Tac Toe (SinglePlayer), Snake, and Traffic Car. The selected difficulty is passed to the game logic.

Upgrade SinglePlayer Tic Tac Toe (frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx) with three AI difficulty modes: Easy uses fully random moves; Medium randomly mixes random and optimal moves (e.g., 50/50); Hard uses Minimax algorithm for unbeatable AI. The difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.

Upgrade the Snake game (frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx) with three speed-based difficulty modes: Easy uses slow tick interval (~200ms), Medium uses normal (~130ms), Hard uses fast (~70ms). Difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.

Upgrade the Traffic Car game (frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx) with three difficulty modes: Easy uses slow traffic speed and fewer cars; Medium uses normal speed and car density; Hard uses fast speed with more simultaneous cars. Difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.
Integrate the global mute/unmute toggle button into all game pages and the Home page header/navbar area, styled consistently with the dark neon theme (e.g., a speaker icon with neon glow).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add HTML5 sound effects (click, win, game over, scoring, special events) with global mute/unmute toggle across all games
Add difficulty selector screen (Easy/Medium/Hard) before each game, styled in dark neon theme
Tic Tac Toe difficulty levels: Easy (random AI), Medium (mixed strategy), Hard (Minimax AI)
Snake difficulty levels: Easy (slow speed), Medium (normal speed), Hard (fast speed)
Traffic Car difficulty levels: Easy (slow traffic), Medium (normal), Hard (fast + more cars)
